faq.q: How many GCC centers does Generali operate in India?
faq.a: Generali operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Generali have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Generali's India GCC presence is in Mumbai.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Generali run in India?
faq.a: Generali runs CoE centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Generali's India GCCs?
faq.a: Generali's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Generali's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 5 leaders at Generali's India centers, across IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
